title: Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed — Chapter 851
main_description: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Betrayal Revealed storyline with 167 dialogue beats. Pudding’s deception and Big Mom’s intentions become clear, changing the rescue from infiltration to survival.
